# Alliance Medical Supply & Rental

> Alliance Medical Supply & Rental is the Bay Area's trusted provider of medical equipment rentals and sales, located in San Jose, CA. Exemplary Provider accredited by The Compliance Team with 20+ years of experience. We primarily rent durable medical equipment (DME) for home use with same-day delivery throughout the Bay Area, including San Jose, San Francisco, Oakland, Fremont, Hayward, Berkeley, Palo Alto, Sunnyvale, and surrounding communities. Call (408) 942-9000.

## Business Details

- Name: Alliance Medical Supply & Rental
- Phone: (408) 942-9000
- Email: hello@alliancemedsupply.com
- Address: 1630 Oakland Road, Suite A110, San Jose, CA 95131
- Store Hours: Mon-Fri 11AM-5PM, Sat by appointment
- Phone Hours: Mon-Fri 9AM-5PM
- Website: https://www.alliancemedsupply.com
- Accreditation: Exemplary Provider (The Compliance Team)

Our primary business is rentals (approximately 90% of revenue). We offer same-day delivery and setup throughout the Bay Area.

## Equipment for Rent

- Wheelchairs: Standard, pediatric, bariatric, and reclining wheelchairs
- Electric Wheelchairs: Power chairs and collapsible electric wheelchairs
- Transport Chairs: Lightweight chairs with and without brakes
- Hospital Beds: Full electric, semi-electric, and bariatric beds with mattresses (gel foam, low air loss, bariatric)
- Patient Lifts: Manual and electric Hoyer lifts, manual and electric stand assists
- Mobility Scooters: Small, standard, lightweight, and heavy-duty scooters
- Lift Chairs: Reclining power lift chairs
- Knee Scooters: Seated and standard knee walkers
- Rollators: Standard and bariatric rolling walkers
- CPM Machines: Continuous Passive Motion machines for post-surgery knee rehabilitation
- PureWick System: Non-invasive external catheter system

## Service Area

We deliver to San Jose, San Francisco, Oakland, Fremont, Sunnyvale, Santa Clara, Hayward, Berkeley, Palo Alto, Walnut Creek, San Mateo, Concord, Pleasanton, Milpitas, Mountain View, Cupertino, San Leandro, Campbell, Alameda, Los Gatos, Morgan Hill, Livermore, Union City, and surrounding Bay Area communities.

## Product Pages

- [Wheelchairs](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/wheelchairs): Standard, pediatric, bariatric, and reclining wheelchair rental and sales in San Jose and Bay Area
- [Electric Wheelchairs](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/electric-wheelchairs): Power chairs and collapsible electric wheelchair rental
- [Hospital Beds](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/electric-hospital-beds-and-mattresses): Full electric, semi-electric, and bariatric hospital bed rental with mattresses
- [Patient Lifts](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/stand-assists-and-lifts): Hoyer lift and stand assist rental, manual and electric options
- [Mobility Scooters](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/mobility-scooters): Compact to heavy-duty mobility scooter rental
- [Lift Chairs](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/lift-chair): Reclining power lift chair rental for safe sit-to-stand assistance
- [Knee Scooters](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/knee-scooters): Knee walker rental for foot and ankle injury recovery
- [Rollators](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/rollators): Standard and bariatric rolling walker rental
- [Transport Chairs](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/transport-chairs): Lightweight transport chair rental for easy patient travel
- [CPM Machine](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/cpm-machine): Continuous Passive Motion machine rental for post-surgery knee rehabilitation
- [PureWick System](https://www.alliancemedsupply.com/products/purewick): Non-invasive external catheter system rental
